question:
Read the following instructions :
A$D means 'A is to the North of D'
A&D means 'A is to the East of D'
A*D means 'D is to the West of A'
A%D means 'D is to the South of A'
A@DR means 'A stands exactly in the middle of the horizontal line of DR'
A!DR means 'A stands exactly in the middle of the vertical line of DR'
It should be noted that 'A6m$D' means 'A is 6 meters to the north of D' and so on.
Find the shortest distance between S and T in the following expression :
'B12m$S5m*R3m&J6m%K!JT'
Ramana was born on 29th February, 2016 which happened to be a Monday. If he lives till 2099, how many birthdays would he celebrate on a Monday ?
